title: orchis papilionacea subsp. bruhnsiana
intro: Orchis papilionacea subsp. bruhnsiana is a rare and lesser-known subspecies of the bee orchid, a type of terrestrial orchid native to Europe and Western Asia. Traditionally, it has been used in herbal medicine due to its reported medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic effects. The health benefits associated with Orchis papilionacea subsp. bruhnsiana include its potential to soothe and calm digestive issues, as well as its use as a natural remedy for respiratory problems and skin conditions. The plant is often prepared in herbal remedies such as teas, infusions, and tinctures, although its use should be approached with caution and under the guidance of a qualified healthcare professional.
